primary_method: normalized infrastructure cash flow and enterprise value
weighting_rationale: Use the method matched to the economic claim. Treat specialist opinions as tests, not weights, and do not average incompatible methods.
agreed_facts: All material components have explicit low/base/high estimates and overlap controls.
disputed_facts: Project-cohort invested capital, utilization and after-tax cash returns are not disclosed.
Customer-level MVC, dedication, renewal and termination economics are not disclosed.
Actual covenant headroom and a stressed sources-and-uses bridge are not disclosed.
recommendation: research_blocked; do not advance to a security decision until the critical acceptance tests are met.

operational_milestones: Publish project-cohort invested capital and realized after-tax cash return.
Disclose revenue/EBITDA coverage by MVC, dedication and merchant activity.
Reconcile actual covenant ratios and 2026–2033 downside funding.
thesis_break_conditions: Mature project cohorts earn below the cost of capital.
Stressed interest coverage approaches 2.50x or net leverage approaches 5.00x.
Equity issuance is required to complete committed projects.
